description: A quality auditor reviews the testing records for a batch of manufactured products.

nodes.task_description: Select a recently completed production batch and obtain its quality control test records.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor receives the testing documentation for the selected batch.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all required tests were performed at the specified frequencies.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor confirms all tests were completed.

nodes.task_description: Review the test results to ensure they all fall within the acceptable specification limits.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor finds that one test result was outside the acceptable range, but the batch was released anyway. This is documented as a major non-conformance.
